description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
The subject Mercedes-Benz vehicle was driving in the back parking lot of the Nvidia Endeavor office complex in Santa Clara, CA (parallel 
to the San Tomas Aquino Creek). The Mercedes-Benz vehicle was driven in conventional mode to a stop adjacent to vehicles parked in the 
parking lot, and perpendicular to a parked Chevrolet Camaro. The driver in the Mercedes-Benz vehicle then shifted into Park (“P”) via the 
gearshift lever. While the Mercedes-Benz vehicle was stopped, the Chevrolet Camaro reversed out of its parking space and contacted the 
Mercedes-Benz vehicle at the right rear door. As a result, the right rear corner of the Chevrolet Camaro and the right rear passenger door of 
the Mercedes-Benz vehicle sustained minor damage. There were no reported injuries to any of the occupants. The incident is being reported 
under OL316 in an abundance of caution. 
Print
Clear Form
